title: Breaking and Placing Blocks
description: Learn the basics of block manipulation

content.text:
Block Basics

In Minecraft, everything is made of blocks. Learning to break and place blocks is fundamental to building and creating.

Breaking Blocks:

  • Left-click and hold on a block to break it
  • Different blocks take different amounts of time to break
  • Some blocks require specific tools to break efficiently
  • Broken blocks drop as items you can collect

Placing Blocks:

  • Select a block from your inventory
  • Right-click to place it in the world
  • You can place blocks on top of, beside, or against other blocks
  • Some blocks have special placement rules

Block Types:

  • Natural blocks - Dirt, stone, wood, sand
  • Crafted blocks - Planks, bricks, glass
  • Functional blocks - Crafting tables, furnaces, chests
content.task: Practice breaking different types of blocks (dirt, wood, stone) and then place them to create a small structure.
